title: Mini Spatula Silicone Small for Makeup Spatula- Thin Jar Spatula ，for Thin Jar/Kitchen Bottles/Cosmetic Bottles 4Pack (Multicolor)
description:
About this item
1.【 4-PIECE SILICONE SET INCLUDES】: 1*Small Spatula, 1*Medium Spatula, and 2*Large Spatula.
2.【MADE OF FOOD GRADE SILICONE MATERIAL】: 100% Food Grade Silicone with Stainless steel core inside, which could be used for any food and makeup, BPA FREE, will not be polluted or eroded, safe and health, long service life accompanied by you all the time.
3.【 EASY TO CLEAN & WIDELY USAGE】: Silicone Spatulas can be run in the dishwasher. Hand washing is recommended. Suitable for peanut butter and ketchup, Jars, Honey, Cosmetics, Hand Lotion, Pain Cream, Body Lotion, Foundation, Hair Products, Shampoo, Conditioner, Lip gloss, Nail Polish, and so on.
4.【RETRIEVE EVERY OF YOUR PRODUCTS】: The Mini Spatula ideal for reaching food in jars and other tight space, even for super slight makeup opening, grocery, and personal care item.
5.【 LIFETIME WARRANTY WITHOUT WORRY】: If you're anything less than amazed by product, you can return it no-questions-asked for a 100% refund.
reviews_5s:
I was looking for something to help me scoop the last bit of lotion at the bottom of the container, and found this great product. My fiance made fun of me for not wanting to just throw the lotion container out, but I don’t like seeing my hard earned money go to waste like that! So, when I got these sticks, I was immediately able to scoop out the lotion at the bottom of the container. It’s an amazing feeling! These are a good price and get the job done. I also like that you get different sizes as well.They're longer than I thought but a perfect set.
I use them to get the end of make up, perfum resin and cream bottles.
Very usefulI use the mini spatulas for food and some for my cosmetics. great item. Useful to get handcreme out of tall pump bottle, and for my mini blender.these spatulas are great quality. I used the small one for facial products daily and the tallers ones for food containers like mayo, as well as products that have a small opening. very good to have on hand.I don't want to throw away the lotion bottle without using this product anymore. It feels good to be able to use the entire lotion content in the bottle. It's easy to wash, I just put it in the dishwasher.
I just wish it had a spoon-like curvature so that it's easier to scrape it off from the bottom.These really have worked well for us. Being able to get out the very last bits of everything from pesto to lotion is a huge help. We ordered more packs and gave them to several friends as gifts and everyone else loved them too.There was always product left in the bottle and I wanted it lol now I can get it alllllStocking stuffers for adultsAbsolutely love these little spatulas. You can get into a lotion bottle and get out the rest of the lotion that stays in the bottom, especially in a pump bottle. You can get in a catsup bottle, a mayonnaise bottle, a mustard bottle….you get the idea!!! No more waste!Handy dandy for corralling every type of jar. Perfect for mixing sourdough starter, starting stuck catsup and getting the last drop out of personal care products.
reviews_1s: I bought these to get the last of lotions or makeup or whatever out of a bottle. You would think it would because it looks like a spatula but it's hard and it really doesn't get all of it out of the bottle especially around the top of the bottle where there is a place where the spatula is not wide enough to get the lotion. So overall I would not go with these I would look for something else with better reviews. I would have sent them back but I did not use them until after the window of opportunity to do so.ReturnefThese spatulas are very small. The handles are smaller than a straw and the width of the spatulas are not much wider than the handles. They do not work to clean a small jar! They are definitely not worth buying!I purchased these spatulas to get the last bits of product from lotion bottles and other cream/liquid makeup products. These were cheaper than the spatulas advertised for that use, but I’m not impressed. The spatulas aren’t flat, but more rounded, so they really can’t scoop much product. The product basically just coats the surface, so you’ll spend forever trying to get any sizable amount of product out of the container. Unfortunately, I missed the return window so they’ll probably collect dust unless I can find another use for them.Only one of the four spatulas is actually mini, the other ones are super longFor me, it felt like they would spin between my fingers so I sent them back.They arrived in opened packages , dirty, and broken. And I say “packages” because there were two of the same packages wrapped around the spatulas. Almost like they had been repackaged twice and sent back out as new. Disappointing because they would have been useful.I needed to stir some tahini and remembered I had purchased these handy spatulas. It worked, but after I washed it (not in the dishwasher), I noticed the silicone was broken. :(. So, one is already unusable.They are okay for really skinny bottles. There needs to be one that's a bit wider than the rest for the slightly bigger bottles. I also think the handles are too long. I cut a couple of them in half.Like the concept. The silicone does not reach to the ends of the spatula, which causes the metal to poke through the silicone. Silicone ends are not stiff enough to scrape anything clean.
